layoutRegions.name: masthead
layoutRegions.purpose: Summarize directory ownership posture and expose the reassignment staging action.

layoutRegions.name: owner-attestation-grid
layoutRegions.purpose: Inspect directory resource owners, delegated stewards, attestation evidence, and reassignment status.

layoutRegions.name: approver-and-group-risk
layoutRegions.purpose: Compare stale approvers, missing attestations, group risk, and escalation windows.

layoutRegions.name: reassignment-plans
layoutRegions.purpose: Stage rollback-safe owner reassignment plans with delegated stewardship fallbacks.

components.name: OwnerCard
components.purpose: Shows one resource owner with steward, attestation evidence, and attested, escalate, or reassign state.
interactions: state is visible through tokenized border color
card content stays stable across responsive breakpoints

components.name: GroupRiskRow
components.purpose: Captures group risk, owner identity, escalation window, and reassignment status.
interactions: grid collapses without hiding escalation window details

components.name: OwnerReassignmentPlan
components.purpose: Captures reassignment action and rollback-safe recovery path.
interactions: rollback note remains visible at narrow widths

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
